category_sources: Official homepage describes Profanity as a console based XMPP client written in C using ncurses and libstrophe.
source_facts.description identifies Profanity as a console based XMPP client.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses the Profanity project name.
source_facts.homepage is the official Profanity site.
docs_sources: Official homepage lists Documentation links including User Guide and FAQ.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository is profanity-im/profanity and describes Profanity as an ncurses based XMPP client.
Official Profanity homepage links to GitHub for the project.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists XMPP chat, MUC, encryption, roster, notifications, and plugins features.
source_facts.description identifies a console based XMPP client.
